tagline: Track API, SDK, and vendor change risk before it breaks your product.
target_user: Solo founders, indie hackers, and small developer teams that rely on third-party APIs, SDKs, and SaaS tools.
problem: Important deprecation notices, pricing changes, SSL expiries, and migration deadlines get scattered across docs, emails, and status pages, so lean teams react too late.
solution: A mobile command center for tracking vendors, logging deadlines, keeping migration notes, and surfacing the riskiest upcoming changes in one calm, offline-friendly workflow.
feature_v1: Priority inbox for risks due in the next 7, 30, and 90 days
Tracked vendor cards with category, owner, and criticality
Deadline timeline for API sunsets, contract renewals, and certificate expiry
Migration checklist and notes for each vendor
Sample JSON export/import handoff section for offline-first workflows
monetization: Free tier for up to 10 vendors, then Pro for unlimited tracking, shared workspaces, and cloud sync later.
privacy_notes: This MVP uses demo data only and does not send vendor data anywhere.
If notifications or cloud sync are added later, publish a privacy policy before release.
Avoid collecting sensitive credentials; store only metadata about dependencies and deadlines.

screens.title: Command Center
screens.description: Overview cards, due-soon counts, and a risk inbox with urgency filters.

screens.title: Vendor Watchlist
screens.description: Tracked vendors with owners, categories, links, and migration progress.

screens.title: Timeline & Notes
screens.description: Upcoming deadlines, recent change notes, and export/import reminders.
